title: geophila orbicularis var. orbicularis
intro: Geophila orbicularis var. orbicularis, also known as creeping Jenny, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It is a popular ornamental plant valued for its attractive, round leaves and yellow, star-shaped flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The leaves and roots of Geophila orbicularis var. orbicularis can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
